dependenceDesign.B1: nested bootstrap-t circular block construction: 999 outer replications, 199 inner replications per outer draw, replication-specific inner standard errors, automatic block length, and maximum one-sided adverse studentized statistic
dependenceDesign.B2: Bartlett HAC with automatic bandwidth and one-sided Bonferroni simultaneous fallback; no max-t distribution is estimated
dependenceDesign.B4: 1,999-draw joint circular residual-block bootstrap of the discounted thirty-year OM scalar, followed separately by the adverse displacement/external-cost identified-region endpoint

intercurrentEventTreatments.treatment: publish and classify under §8; covered event retains observations
retain observed series; no post-lock model change

vintage.rule: all secured series as available at lock; no later revision admitted

validation.benchmark: naive one-year persistence on the identical held-out outcome
validation.survivalRule: every preregistered legally operative outcome is tested separately; a member survives only if each outcome-specific RMSE is no worse than its matching persistence RMSE; the maximum RMSE ratio controls

executableProcedure: read each byte-locked raw contrast artifact
verify exact 2272-2291 coverage and explicit 50/70 fields
consume and validate every identification rule
fit on 2272-2286 only under the shared exogenous path
validate every legally operative outcome separately on 2287-2291 and retain failures
refit surviving member on all 20 observations
select the least-activation-favorable surviving equivalence class and dispose each Finding

treatmentCounterfactual.I: 50-schedule receipts versus enacted-70 receipts with common obligations and demographic path
treatmentCounterfactual.II: 50-schedule dividend versus enacted-70 dividend under a numerical schedule-attribution share
treatmentCounterfactual.III: 50-schedule versus enacted-70 SCM activation and Flow paths under a numerical liquidity-response share
treatmentCounterfactual.IV: retained tranche through traced private ventures versus the same tranche through realized public first allocation

diagnosticProcedures.D1: set all 30 discount factors to one and sum net OM
diagnosticProcedures.D2: apply logarithmic marginal-consumption weights: baseline mean canonical consumption / projected canonical consumption
diagnosticProcedures.D3: discounted deposited beyond-horizon value divided by absolute OM plus that value
diagnosticProcedures.D4: publish discounted public-capture surplus numerator and discounted gross private Marshallian-surplus denominator as a pair, without quotient
diagnosticProcedures.D5: pair each member adverse bound with the executed Finding III frequency upper bound

dataSourceMappings.transform: shared-exposure normalization followed by the locked functional class; no cross-credit or behavioral adjustment except an executed locked rule
dataSourceMappings.custodian: Canonical Statistical Authority, Path 2 escrow desk
dataSourceMappings.treatmentQuantity: annual real receipts under the proposed 50 percent schedule
dataSourceMappings.counterfactualQuantity: annual real receipts under the enacted 70 percent schedule; obligations are common
dataSourceMappings.sharedExogenousInput: sharedDemographicIndex, projected once and applied identically to both schedules
dataSourceMappings.uncertaintyConstruction: joint B-1 bootstrap-t or B-2 Bonferroni HAC construction over coverage and receipt contrast

dataSourceMappings.transform: shared-exposure normalization followed by the locked functional class; no cross-credit or behavioral adjustment except an executed locked rule
dataSourceMappings.custodian: Canonical Statistical Authority, Path 2 escrow desk
dataSourceMappings.treatmentQuantity: real per-resident dividend under the proposed 50 schedule
dataSourceMappings.uncertaintyConstruction: simultaneous bounds for attributed treatment dividend and the numerical schedule effect

dataSourceMappings.transform: shared-exposure normalization followed by the locked functional class; no cross-credit or behavioral adjustment except an executed locked rule
dataSourceMappings.custodian: Canonical Statistical Authority, Path 2 escrow desk
dataSourceMappings.treatmentQuantity: SCM activation frequency and Flow margin under proposed 50
observedOrEstimatedSources: matched schedule-subject holding panels under 50 and 70
dataSourceMappings.uncertaintyConstruction: joint simultaneous bounds for both outcome paths and both schedule contrasts

dataSourceMappings.transform: shared-exposure normalization followed by the locked functional class; no cross-credit or behavioral adjustment except an executed locked rule
dataSourceMappings.custodian: Canonical Statistical Authority, Path 2 escrow desk
dataSourceMappings.treatmentQuantity: welfare from ledger-traced private deployment of the retained 70-to-50 tranche
dataSourceMappings.counterfactualQuantity: welfare from the same tranche under realized public first allocation
dataSourceMappings.uncertaintyConstruction: B-1 bootstrap-t or B-4 direct joint block bootstrap of the discounted scalar, with the identified-region endpoint added separately

randomSeedProcedure.subSeedDerivation: mix32(baseSeed XOR ((outer+1)*0x9e3779b1) XOR ((inner+1)*0x85ebca6b)); inner zero reserved for outer draw

B1.failureHandling: discard zero/nonfinite inner-SE outer replicate; abort below 90 percent valid; abort on zero original-estimate SE

precisionClarification.scope: Measurement-only clarification of Charter §5.3; substantive Finding II zero-impairment and Finding IV positive-OM thresholds are unchanged.
